author: j4charlie
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Adds Material-style file and folder icons to the Obsidian file explorer.

manifest.author: Local
manifest.description: Adds Material-style file and folder icons to the file explorer.
manifest.name: material-icon-theme-for-vault

name: material-icon-theme-for-vault

releases.author: j4charlie
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Temporarily removed folder connection lines to avoid unstable folder hierarchy rendering in Obsidian's file explorer.
- Kept file and folder icon decoration active while simplifying the file tree layout handling.

## Validation

- Ran `node --check main.js`.
- Ran `git diff --check`.

releases.author: j4charlie
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Added compatibility handling for the Code Files plugin so supported code files can open from the Obsidian file explorer with the Code Files editor view.
- Made the rendered file-extension label non-interactive, keeping file-tree clicks routed to the native file row.
- Reduced full file-tree rescans during folder expand/collapse interactions by refreshing only the affected folder subtree.
- Improved folder branch-line refresh timing after folder interactions for more stable tree layout rendering.

## Validation

- Ran `node --check main.js`.

releases.author: j4charlie
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Added a theme compatibility action that can create or remove a neutral file-tree CSS snippet, helping suppress theme-specific file explorer colors while preserving plugin icons.
- Reworked file explorer folder arrows and branch lines so expanded folders render continuous, centered vertical guide lines under their arrows.
- Added file-row arrow spacers so files and folders align consistently in the tree.
- Reduced file-tree indentation for a denser, cleaner outline while keeping branch lines aligned with folder arrows.
- Improved startup and interaction refresh timing for the decorated file explorer.

## Assets

- Included the Obsidian plugin files: manifest.json, main.js, and styles.css.
- Repacked and attached material-icon-souce.zip with the icon resources from dist/ and icons/.

releases.author: j4charlie
releases.description:
## What's changed

- Added a bilingual usage tip to the settings page.
- The settings page now reminds users to enable Obsidian's "Detect all file extensions" option when a vault contains many file types.
- The settings page now recommends installing the Code Files plugin for better code-file handling.
- Improved automatic theme compatibility for Style Settings-driven themes such as Blue Topaz.
- Fixed file and folder icon overlap by forcing decorated file explorer rows into a stable flex layout.
- Hid theme-provided pseudo icons only on rows decorated by this plugin, avoiding changes to the user's theme settings.

## Resource pack

Download material-icon-souce.zip from this release, extract it, then import the extracted folder from the plugin settings page if Obsidian did not install the icon resources automatically.

releases.author: j4charlie
releases.description:
## What's changed

- Added a language selector for the settings page, with English as the default and Chinese as an optional language.
- Added GitHub shortcuts in settings so users can open issues for theme compatibility problems and star the project.
- Added icon resource detection and a settings-page import flow for missing icon resources.
- Added release resource pack documentation and a helper script for uploading material-icon-souce.zip to each release.
- Prevented the file explorer from rendering broken icon URLs when required icon resources are missing.

## Resource pack

Download material-icon-souce.zip from this release, extract it, then import the extracted folder from the plugin settings page if Obsidian did not install the icon resources automatically.
